summary: Analyzed 6 sorries in Soundness.lean (lines 565, 569, 572, 575, 595, 598). Root cause: soundness theorem quantifies over ALL D without frame constraints needed by extension axioms. Resolution requires frame-class-restricted theorems (soundness_dense, soundness_discrete). All component proofs exist in DenseSoundness, DiscreteSoundness, SoundnessLemmas, and IRRSoundness. Temporal duality needs derivation-indexed proof; IRR limited to domain times.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of 6 sorries with wiring strategy, component theorem inventory, and implementation path
